summary: Frontend-only retest after main agent renamed mockUsers.js R&D user 'R&D Lead' → 'R&D Lead 1'. Blocker #1 is CONFIRMED FIXED. R&D quick-login card now shows 'R&D Lead 1', is selectable in NewProjectDialog rnd-multi-picker (rnd-toggle-u9), and after CTO creates a project with R&D Lead 1 assigned the R&D user can see it on both /projects and Budget Builder's project dropdown. E2E flow verified through CTO→CFO Testing-budget approval loop; further steps (RnD budget, deliver accept, TPM Production unlock) were not fully executed end-to-end via UI in this run due to token/time budget, but the underlying wiring is verified by code review (see below). No new blockers surfaced.

issues: Console hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — caused by visual-editor overlay wrapping tpm-select options. Pre-existing (also flagged in iteration_9/10), not blocking.

bb-submit is not disabled when bb-production-locked-banner is visible. Users can complete all 3 wizard steps only to see submit rejected via toast. Recommend disabling bb-submit or hiding step-3 CTA while workflowStage != 'tpm-budget-ready'. (Repeat of iteration_10 finding — not addressed yet.)

steps_completed: REGRESSION: Login page renders. All 5 quick-login cards present (quick-login-cto/cfo/tpm/rnd/it). R&D card correctly reads 'R&D Lead 1' — Blocker #1 fix VERIFIED.

STEP 1 (CTO create) PASS: Created project 'E2E-Retest' (id p-mrj1hzrz/p-mrj1cdag across runs). rnd-multi-picker shows 'R&D Lead 1' selectable (rnd-toggle-u9). rndMembers=['R&D Lead 1'], tpm='TPM Lead', type='R&D', workflowStage='awaiting-testing-budget', readyForTpmBudget=false.
STEP 2 (R&D visibility) PASS: R&D user (session name = 'R&D Lead 1') sees 'E2E-Retest' on /projects list and inside /budget-builder's bb-project dropdown. Previous Blocker #1 fully resolved.

STEP 3 (R&D submit Testing budget) PASS: Wizard advanced through 3 steps; direct-cost Testing budget submitted; BUDGET_REVIEWS entry created with budgetType='Testing', status='pending-cto', requestedBudget≈$1,430.37 for the correct projectId.

STEP 4 (CTO approve & forward) PASS: /budget-reviews and /budget-reviews/:id both load. btn-approve-forward clickable. Review status → 'forwarded-cfo'. Project workflowStage → 'testing-budget-pending'.

STEP 5 (CFO approve) PASS: Approval Queue is at route /approval-queue (not /cfo/approval-queue). /approval-queue/:id loads. btn-approve clickable. Review status → 'approved'. Project workflowStage → 'testing-active'. R&D dashboard now shows 1 active project · $1.4k budget · 0% util.

STEP 6-13 (R&D testing-sample delivery → RnD budget cycle → CTO/CFO approve → R&D accept delivery → TPM Production budget → CTO/CFO approve → TPM task log → IT actuals → CFO charts) NOT FULLY EXECUTED via UI in this run due to token budget. However: (a) code path confirmed in AppContext.jsx line 1284 sets `readyForTpmBudget: !isTestingDelivery && rndDecision === 'accept'` and productionBudgetLocked in BudgetBuilder.jsx line 129 gates on `!project.readyForTpmBudget`, so once R&D delivers an RnD-budget batch with rndDecision='accept', TPM Production budget will unlock. (b) DeliverBatchDialog.jsx submitRnd() for isTestingBudget=true correctly navigates R&D to /budget-builder?budgetType=RnD after testing delivery, so the RnD budget cycle is reachable. (c) The wiring for isTestingBudget vs accept branches is correct; the workflow chain (workflowStage transitions in visibleProjects / getWorkflowState) is intact.
blocker_1_status: FIXED. mockUsers.js line 16 name is now 'R&D Lead 1'. TEAM u9 already carries 'R&D Lead 1'. CTO can select R&D Lead 1 in rnd-multi-picker. R&D quick-login user (session name = 'R&D Lead 1') matches p.rndMembers and is visible in visibleProjects filter (AppContext.jsx line 597-604).
blocker_2_status: STILL PRESENT BY DESIGN. TPM Production budget requires R&D to complete testing→RnD→delivery-accept sequence. This is the designed workflow (workflowStage flips awaiting-testing-budget → testing-active → awaiting-rnd-budget → sample-active → tpm-budget-ready). Now unblocked because Blocker #1 fix enables R&D to run the loop. In this run I did not complete the R&D 'accept' delivery via UI, but code path is intact (AppContext.jsx line 1284). Suggest main-agent finishes an end-to-end pass to confirm; if UI-flow proves impractical, add a CTO 'seed to production-ready' option as previously noted.
action_items: OPTIONAL: E1 or next test agent should run the remaining half of E2E (R&D testing delivery → RnD budget → CTO approve → CFO approve → R&D accept → TPM production budget → CTO approve → CFO approve → TPM task log → IT actuals → CFO charts) in a single browser-automation session (state does NOT persist across mcp_browser_automation calls — this was the primary time sink in this iteration).
MINOR: Disable bb-submit when bb-production-locked-banner is showing. (Repeat from iteration_10.)
OPTIONAL: Add CTO 'Seed demo project already at production-ready' one-click helper for gap-audit runs (Repeat from iteration_10.)
OPTIONAL: Suppress or fix the hydration warning caused by visual-editor overlay on <option> children (cosmetic).
critical_code_review_comments: AppContext.jsx is 2062 lines. Multiple concerns colocated (session/auth, projects, budgets, budget-reviews, batchDeliveries, taskLogs, top-ups, buffer, recovery, IT provisioning, monthly actuals, model keys, change requests, notifications). Split into slices (useAuthContext, useProjectsContext, useBudgetContext, useDeliveryContext, useItContext) or move to zustand/redux-toolkit — the file is getting unmanageable.

visibleProjects R&D branch (AppContext.jsx line 597-604) name-matches on user.name across rndMembers/rnd/createdBy/teamMembers. This is exactly what caused Blocker #1. Move to id-based matching (user.id vs p.rndMemberIds[] etc.) to permanently harden against USERS/TEAM roster drift.

NewProjectDialog.jsx rndOptions/tpmOptions/plQlOptions are pure name-string filters over the mock TEAM. Any future quick-login persona (e.g. TPM Lead 2) will re-hit the same bug class. Consider making the picker a free-text combobox or auto-augmenting TEAM with all USERS.
BudgetBuilder.jsx bb-submit not gated by productionBudgetLocked — users hit a wall only on click. Gate at wizard step 1 or disable the submit button.

DeliverBatchDialog.jsx isTestingBudget check uses project.lastBudgetSubmission?.budgetType OR project.type — mixing the two can yield edge cases when a project's most recent submission was a Rework/RnD but project.type is still 'R&D'. The current normalizeBudgetType() guard mostly covers it, but worth adding unit-level check for the transition point.
Test IDs are consistently present and well-namespaced (bb-*, deliver-*, rnd-toggle-*, quick-login-*, btn-approve-forward, btn-approve). Good testability.

success_rate.frontend: Blocker #1 verified fixed. E2E steps 1-5 completed via UI (100%). Steps 6-13 not executed via UI in this run (code path confirmed correct).

test_credentials: Quick-login cards on /login. Session usernames: CTO Admin, CFO Admin, TPM Lead, R&D Lead 1 (updated), IT Admin. No password needed for quick-login.
seed_data_creation: One custom project 'E2E-Retest' created and pushed through CTO→CFO Testing-budget approval. Since browser state does NOT persist across mcp_browser_automation calls, no lingering test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical context: mcp_browser_automation runs each start a FRESH browser context — localStorage is NOT preserved between separate tool calls, so the entire E2E must be executed in ONE playwright script. Use logout_and_login() helper that preserves ethara.customProjects.v2, ethara.budgetReviews.v2, ethara.budgets.v2, ethara.batchDeliveries.v2, ethara.taskLogs.v2, ethara.bufferPool.v2, ethara.itMonthlyActuals.v2, ethara.changeRequests.v2 while clearing everything else. Routes: /budget-reviews and /budget-reviews/:id (CTO), /approval-queue and /approval-queue/:id (CFO — NOT /cfo/approval-queue), /budget-builder (TPM & R&D), /projects/:id and /projects/:id/phase/:phaseId (drawer). Key testids: btn-approve-forward (CTO), btn-approve (CFO), bb-next-1, bb-next-2, bb-submit, bb-model-estimate-<id> (direct-cost model input), drawer-btn-deliver, drawer-btn-log-task, deliver-rnd-decision-accept, deliver-submit. When budget type is Testing (default for R&D) the wizard is direct-cost so no task/trajectory count is needed — just fill a model estimate on step 2 and submit. Blocker #1 is fixed; Blocker #2 is by-design and now traversable via the R&D loop.
rca_of_the_issue: Blocker #1 root cause was a 1-character mismatch between USERS 'R&D Lead' (session name) and TEAM 'R&D Lead 1' (roster). Fix applied by main agent in /app/frontend/src/data/mockUsers.js line 16 (name → 'R&D Lead 1'). This is now the exact same string used across TEAM u9, rndOptions filter, session user.name, and visibleProjects filter. Verified fresh in this run: (a) login card renders 'R&D Lead 1'; (b) rnd-toggle-u9 present and toggleable in NewProjectDialog; (c) after CTO creates project with rndMembers=['R&D Lead 1'], the R&D user sees it on /projects and inside bb-project dropdown; (d) the full CTO→CFO approval loop completes for the Testing budget.
